hr { margin: 1rem 0px; color: inherit; background-color: currentcolor; border: 0px; opacity: 0.25; }

div.asl_w { width: 100%; height: auto; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); overflow: hidden; border: 0px solid rgb(181, 181, 181); border-radius: 0px; box-shadow: rgb(228, 228, 228) 0px 1px 0px 0px; }

#ajaxsearchlite1 .probox, div.asl_w .probox { margin: 0px; height: 28px; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); border: 0px none rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 0px; box-shadow: rgb(181, 181, 181) 0px 0px 0px 0px inset

div.asl_w .probox .proinput input::-webkit-input-placeholder { font-weight: normal; font-family: "Open Sans"; text-shadow: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0) 0px 0px 0px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6) !important; }

div.asl_w .probox .proinput input.autocomplete { font-weight: normal; font-family: "Open Sans"; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); font-size: 12px; line-height: 15px; text-shadow: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0) 0px 0px 0px; }
div.asl_w .probox .proloading, div.asl_w .probox .proclose, div.asl_w .probox .promagnifier, div.asl_w .probox .prosettings { width: 28px; height: 28px; }
